description: Door gasket shows visible gaps, tears, or deformation allowing warm air infiltration
visual_signals: torn rubber seal
visible gap between door and frame
frost ring around door perimeter

description: Ice accumulation on floor surfaces creating slip and fall hazard for personnel
visual_signals: ice sheet on floor
frost buildup near threshold
glossy wet surface inside freezer

description: Shelves and racks overpacked obstructing airflow vents and evaporator circulation
visual_signals: product pressed against ceiling
blocked vent openings
no visible gaps between stacked items and walls

description: Temperature display showing out-of-range reading or unit displaying error code
visual_signals: digital display with high temperature value
flashing warning indicator
blank or error screen on thermometer

description: Racking uprights bent, beams deformed, or safety clips missing from forklift impact damage
visual_signals: bent vertical rack column
deformed horizontal beam
missing beam locking pins

description: Emergency release handle inside walk-in is obstructed, unlabeled, or not visible
visual_signals: product stacked in front of release handle
missing glow-in-the-dark label
handle obscured by ice buildup

description: Lighting inside cold storage unit is failed, flickering, or insufficient for safe operations
visual_signals: dark areas inside unit
flickering light fixture
broken light cover

description: Condensation or water pooling at door threshold creating slip hazard and ice formation risk
visual_signals: standing water at door base
wet floor extending from entrance
drip marks on floor surface

description: Raw food products stored above cooked or ready-to-eat items risking cross-contamination
visual_signals: raw meat on upper shelf above prepared food
uncovered raw product dripping onto items below
improper vertical storage order

description: Personnel inside cold storage without required PPE such as thermal gloves or insulated clothing
visual_signals: bare hands handling frozen product
worker in short sleeves inside freezer
missing insulated footwear

description: Ammonia leak detector missing, improperly positioned, or showing alert status in refrigeration machinery room
visual_signals: empty mounting bracket where ammonia detector should be installed
ammonia detector display showing alarm or fault code
detector positioned above head height away from likely leak points

description: Ammonia refrigeration PPE station missing, incomplete, or obstructed near machinery room entrance
visual_signals: empty PPE cabinet or missing SCBA unit at machinery room door
ammonia PPE station blocked by stored materials
expired or damaged full-face respirator in ammonia PPE cabinet

description: Visual indicators of ammonia leak such as frost plume, oil residue at pipe fittings, or pungent odor warning signage activated
visual_signals: white frost plume or vapor cloud near refrigeration piping
oily residue at pipe joints or valve packing glands
ammonia warning beacon or strobe light activated on machinery room exterior

description: Evaporator coil shows excessive ice buildup indicating defrost cycle failure or door seal compromise
visual_signals: thick ice encasing evaporator coil fins
icicles hanging from evaporator unit housing
frost completely blocking evaporator air intake grille

description: Evaporator drain pan overflowing or drain line frozen causing water or ice accumulation below unit
visual_signals: water dripping from evaporator housing onto stored product
ice mound formed beneath evaporator drain point
drain pan visibly full with water spilling over edges

description: Floor drains frozen, clogged, or in unsanitary condition preventing proper drainage in cold storage areas
visual_signals: ice cap covering floor drain grate
standing water pooled around clogged drain
discolored or slimy buildup around drain opening

description: Forklift battery charging room near cold storage lacking proper heating, ventilation, or hydrogen gas monitoring
visual_signals: frost or condensation on battery charger units in unheated room
no visible exhaust ventilation in battery charging enclosure
missing hydrogen gas detector in enclosed charging area

description: Anti-slip floor coating worn, peeling, or traction tape deteriorated in cold storage traffic areas
visual_signals: smooth bare concrete exposed where anti-slip coating has worn away
peeling or bubbling floor coating in freezer traffic lanes
traction tape strips curled, torn, or missing from walking surfaces

description: Condensation management failure with fogged door glass, sweating walls, or non-functional anti-sweat heaters on door frames
visual_signals: heavy condensation or fog on cold storage door glass obscuring view
water streaming down walls near cold-warm boundary
frost formation on door frame indicating anti-sweat heater failure

description: Product rotation non-compliance with missing or illegible FIFO labels, date codes, or lot tracking markers
visual_signals: pallets lacking visible date labels or FIFO rotation tags
older date-coded product stacked behind newer product
illegible or frost-obscured lot tracking labels on stored items

description: Blast freezer door interlock missing or bypassed and personnel entrapment prevention system non-functional
visual_signals: blast freezer door interlock switch wired in bypass position
missing interior emergency alarm pull station inside blast freezer
no interior release handle or panic hardware visible on blast freezer door

description: Blast freezer timer display non-functional or cycle indicator missing preventing personnel awareness of active freeze cycles
visual_signals: blank or non-functional timer display on blast freezer control panel
no exterior running indicator showing active freeze cycle in progress
missing warning beacon or status light at blast freezer entry

description: Insulated panel integrity compromised with dents, delamination, moisture staining, or exposed foam indicating thermal breach
visual_signals: dented or punctured insulated metal panel on cold storage wall
panel joint separation with visible foam insulation exposed
brown moisture staining or bubbling paint on panel surface indicating infiltration

description: Fire protection system in cold storage showing dry sprinkler heads with corrosion, missing escutcheons, or non-functional indicators
visual_signals: corroded or ice-encrusted dry sprinkler heads in freezer space
missing escutcheon plate around sprinkler penetration through insulated panel
dry system air pressure gauge reading zero or in alarm range

description: Cold storage dock interface lacking strip curtains, dock shelter seal, or temperature transition barriers allowing thermal break
visual_signals: missing or torn strip curtain panels at cold storage dock opening
large gap between dock shelter and trailer allowing warm air entry
fog or condensation plume visible at unprotected dock-to-cold-storage transition

description: Oxygen monitoring equipment missing or non-functional in spaces using CO2 or nitrogen for atmosphere control
visual_signals: no oxygen monitor visible at entrance to controlled atmosphere room
oxygen monitor displaying fault code or blank screen
missing low-oxygen warning signage at entrance to spaces with inert gas systems

description: LP-powered forklift operating in enclosed cold storage space without adequate ventilation or catalytic converter
visual_signals: propane-powered forklift visible inside enclosed cold storage room
exhaust haze or fumes visible in cold storage air
LP forklift with missing or damaged catalytic converter operating indoors

description: Lone worker protocol deficiencies with no buddy system indicators, missing personal alarm devices, or absent communication equipment in cold storage
visual_signals: single worker inside cold storage with no communication device visible
empty personal alarm device charging station near cold storage entry
missing sign-in/sign-out log board at cold storage entrance

description: Electrical equipment in cold storage not rated for low temperature environment with visible condensation ingress or missing weatherproof covers
visual_signals: open electrical junction box with condensation droplets on wiring inside cold storage
standard non-rated outlet or switch plate showing frost or moisture in freezer
missing gasket or cover on electrical panel in temperature transition zone

description: IIAR compliance signage missing from ammonia refrigeration machinery room including pipe labeling, emergency contacts, and hazard identification
visual_signals: ammonia piping without color-coded labels indicating liquid, vapor, or pressure levels
missing IIAR emergency procedure placard at machinery room entrance
no emergency contact information posted at ammonia refrigeration equipment area
